ec2.elb.connectiondrainingpolicy.CfnAbou: Specifies the connection draining settings for your Classic Load Balancer.

ec2.elb.connectiondrainingpolicy.Enabled.Description: Specifies whether connection draining is enabled for the load balancer.

ec2.elb.connectiondrainingpolicy.Timeout.Description: The maximum time, in seconds, to keep the existing connections open before deregistering the instances.
